## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why. Link related issues. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (lint, typecheck, test, build)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behavior change
- [ ] `npm run changeset` run, if this is a user-facing change
- [ ] `docs/architecture.md` / `docs/user-story.md` updated, if this changes module
      boundaries or implements/changes a requirement
